description_long: This is a modern two-story house with a flat roof and a minimalist rectangular design, surrounded by a well-manicured hedge and lush landscaping. The exterior features a mix of light brown and beige wall panels, large windows, and a driveway leading to a covered carport. The property includes a private backyard with a wooden deck, outdoor seating, and several mature trees providing shade and privacy. The front yard is landscaped with grass, shrubs, and a paved walkway leading to the main entrance. The house is set adjacent to a wide street, with a secure gate and fence enclosing the property. The overall design emphasizes clean lines, open spaces, and a strong connection between indoor and outdoor living areas.
description: A modern, flat-roofed two-story house with large windows, landscaped yards, and a covered carport, surrounded by hedges and trees.
description_view_0: View 0 shows the house from the side, highlighting the carport, driveway, and a portion of the backyard with dense greenery.
description_view_1: View 1 presents the front of the house, featuring the main entrance, driveway gate, and a clear view of the front yard landscaping.
description_view_2: View 2 displays the rear of the house, focusing on the backyard deck, outdoor seating area, and the flat roof structure.
description_view_3: View 3 captures the opposite side, showing the carport from the back, additional parking space, and the rear entry to the property.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows and vertical strips
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway features a simple modern door, paved walkway, and is set back behind a hedge and gate, with no porch or overhang.
